message:
test(completion): add tests for edge cases and error paths

Increases coverage from 59.2% to 70.7% (+11.5%) by adding tests for:
- AddFailurePattern invalid regex error path (now 100%)
- CheckNow with active assignment (now 100%)
- checkAll nil/empty store, context cancellation (now 33.3%)
- checkAssignment via CheckNow call (now 21.4%)
- Configuration and event struct field coverage
- Concurrent pattern matching thread safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
